name: vulnforge
description: VulnForge — AI-powered vulnerability research platform. Hunt, scan, triage, and report security vulnerabilities.

skills.name: hunt
skills.description: Start an autonomous vulnerability hunt on a Git repo URL, local path, or existing project. Clones, scans with 48+ tools, filters false positives, AI-verifies, and stages findings for review.

skills.name: scan
skills.description: Run specific security analysis tools on a project. Select tools by vulnerability class (memory, crypto, network, etc.) or run full scan.

skills.name: triage
skills.description: Triage and verify vulnerability findings. AI-powered severity assessment, exploitability analysis, and fix suggestions.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Review staged scan findings. Accept verified vulnerabilities into the findings database, reject false positives.

skills.name: report
skills.description: Generate vulnerability disclosure reports — email notifications, security advisories, or brief summaries.

skills.name: status
skills.description: Check VulnForge status — dashboard stats, active pipelines, recent findings, configured AI providers.
